query:
-- Summary: how many openings have puzzles vs don't
SELECT 
  o.isPremium AS isLocked,
  SUM(CASE WHEN puzzleCount > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS withPuzzles,
  SUM(CASE WHEN puzzleCount = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS withoutPuzzles,
  COUNT(*) AS total
FROM (
  SELECT o.id, o.isPremium, COUNT(p.id) AS puzzleCount
  FROM openings o
  LEFT JOIN puzzles p ON p.openingName = o.name OR p.opening = o.name
  GROUP BY o.id, o.isPremium
) AS sub
JOIN openings o ON o.id = sub.id
GROUP BY o.isPremium;

  LEFT JOIN puzzles p ON p.openingName = o.name OR p.opening = o.name

GROUP BY o.isPremium;
